value.stringValue: Blue Arrow - Late Purchase Order Submission

Flow.description: Email Updated to match RSS Global rebrand
Flow.label: PO Management - View PO Information

fields.name: Text1
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

The current Purchase Order will be removed, are you sure you want to proceed?

fields.name: Text1_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

This will remove the Purchase Order

fields.name: Text1_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

This will remove the Purchase Order

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

This will email the details provided to Invoice Queries

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

This will email the details provided to Invoice Queries

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

This will overwrite the previous Purchase Order

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

{!PO_Number} already exists against this account

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

No other S-Placements found, Purchase Order will only be added for the current Record.

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

No other Sites found, Purchase Order will only be added for the current Record.

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

No other Timesheets found, Purchase Order will only be added for the current Record.

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

No other Sites found, Purchase Order will only be added for the current Record.

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

No other Timesheets found, Purchase Order will only be amended for the current Record.

fields.name: Text1_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

This will overwrite the previous Purchase Order

fields.name: POText
fields.fieldText: Active Purchase Orders

fields.name: POText_0_0
fields.fieldText: Inactive Purchase Orders

fields.name: Edit324
fields.fieldText:
Update Purchase Order

This timesheet has not passed to Tempest so the Purchase Order can be manually amended

fields.name: UpdatePO
fields.fieldText: What is the updated Purchase Order Number?

fields.name: UpdateMulti
fields.fieldText: Do you want to submit this Purchase Order against multiple Timesheets?

fields.name: FinalScreen
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Purchase Order {!PO_Number} Created

fields.name: POMissing2_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Purchase Order {!Get_PO.Name} Removed

fields.name: POMissing2_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Late Purchase Order Submitted

fields.name: POMissing2_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Purchase Order Updated

fields.name: POMissing2_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Purchase Order Updated

fields.name: POMissing2_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Purchase Orders Updated

fields.name: afsdfsad
fields.fieldText:
Submit Late Purchase Order

This timesheet has passed to Tempest so a Late Purchase Order needs to be submitted

fields.name: Late_Purchase_Order_Number
fields.fieldText: What Purchase Order Number do you want to submit?

fields.name: Do_you_want_this_Purchase_Order_to_go_against_multiple_Timesheets
fields.fieldText: Do you want to submit this Purchase Order against multiple Timesheets?

fields.name: Text6
fields.fieldText: Adding Purchase Order

fields.name: afsdfasd
fields.fieldText: Which other {!RecordName}s will this Purchase Order apply to?

fields.name: Text6_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Removing Purchase Order


If Purchase Order {!Get_PO.Name} needs removing from additional records please choose below.

Please note this is optional, any records left unticked will keep the same Purchase Order details.

fields.name: Text
fields.fieldText: Adding Purchase Order

fields.name: PO_Exists
fields.fieldText: Does the Purchase Order exist already?

fields.name: PO_Number

fields.name: Does_this_Purchase_Order_Expire

fields.name: When_is_the_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: When is the Start Date?

fields.name: End_Date
fields.fieldText: What is the Expiry Date?

value.stringValue: Do you want to be notified a day before this PO expires?

fields.name: Purchase_Order_Value
fields.fieldText: What is the Value of the Purchase Order?

fields.name: Multiple
fields.fieldText: Do you want this Purchase Order need to apply to multiple {!RecordName}s?

fields.name: Text123
fields.fieldText: Purchase Order Found!

fields.name: ExpiredText
fields.fieldText: Expired Purchase Order Found!

fields.name: POiNFO
fields.fieldText:
Purchase Order Number: {!Get_PO.Name}

Location: {!Get_PO.Location__c}

fields.name: tex5t32423
fields.fieldText: This Purchase Order will be applied to all S-Placements without their own Purchase Orders.

fields.name: asfdafs
fields.fieldText: This Purchase Order will be applied whenever a S-Placement and the associated Site do not have their own Purchase Orders.

fields.name: asfdfds21241
fields.fieldText: This Purchase Order will be applied first ahead of the Site and Job Role.

fields.name: StartText
fields.fieldText: Start Date: {!Get_PO.Start_Date__c}

fields.name: Expirytext
fields.fieldText: Expiry Date: {!Get_PO.End_Date__c}

fields.name: ValueText
fields.fieldText: Value: £{!Get_PO.Value__c}

fields.name: NoneText
fields.fieldText: No Purchase Order Found!

fields.name: NoPO
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

No Purchase Order Populated

fields.name: POTimesheetDetails
fields.fieldText:
Purchase Order Found!


Purchase Order Number: {!Get_Timesheet_Line.IP_PurchaseOrderNumber__c}

fields.name: dasffasd
fields.fieldText:
Manual Purchase Order Found!


Purchase Order Number: {!Get_Timesheet.Manual_Purchase_Order_Number__c}

Added By: {!Get_Timesheet.Manual_Purchase_Order_Added_By__r.Email}

Added Date: {!Get_Timesheet.Manual_Purchase_Order_Added_Date__c}

fields.name: LatePOText
fields.fieldText:
Late Purchase Order Submitted!

﻿

Purchase Order Number: {!Get_Timesheet.Late_Purchase_Order_Number__c}

Submitted By: {!Get_Timesheet.Late_Purchase_Order_Submitted_By__r.Email}

Submitted Date: {!Get_Timesheet.Late_Purchase_Order_Submitted_Date__c}

value.stringValue: Timesheet Passed to Tempest - Submit Late Purchase Order
Timesheet Not Passed to Tempest - Update Purchase Order

fields.name: TimesheetText
fields.fieldText: Recent Timesheets

textTemplates.name: EmailBody
textTemplates.text:
To Whom It May Concern


A late Purchase Order was submitted for a Timesheet that has already passed to Tempest. See details below:

Purchase Order Number: {!Late_Purchase_Order_Number}

Submitted By: {!$User.Email}

Submitted Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}


Below is a list of all Timesheets this Purchase Order applies to:

{!TimesheetList}


Thanks

Blue Arrow
